hero.name: Nguyen Thi Dieu Hang
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: A Software Engineering graduate building web apps end to end — and this site runs an AI right in your browser that can tell you all about me.

about.heading: About
about.body: I'm a Software Engineering graduate from HUTECH with hands-on experience across front-end and back-end web development, including an internship at Viet Japan Partner. I'm Microsoft Azure (AZ-900) certified, a fast learner, and eager to grow as a Full Stack Developer building scalable, user-friendly applications.

exp1.desc: Developed web interfaces and integrated APIs. Collaborated with the team on feature development and testing, and gained hands-on experience with system design and backend integration.

proj1.name: Esme Chatbot
proj1.desc: An AI chatbot with voice interaction and real-time responses — OpenAI for intelligent answers and ElevenLabs text-to-speech for natural voice output.

proj2.name: Portfolio Website
proj2.desc: A full-stack personal portfolio: Angular + Angular Material UI with a .NET backend on Azure SQL, deployed to Vercel and Azure.

proj3.name: Flip Card Game
proj3.desc: A memory-style flip card game with matching logic, smooth animations, a timer, and score tracking.

proj4.name: Fruit Catcher Mini Game
proj4.desc: A 2D catch game with keyboard controls, collision detection, real-time spawning, and local-storage score tracking, built in Cocos Creator.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Have an opportunity or a question? Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
